action.description: The committee on JHA recommend that the measure be PASSED, UNAMENDED. The votes were as follows: 6 Ayes: Representative(s) Tarnas, Hashem, Kahaloa, Takayama; Ayes with reservations: Representative(s) Cochran, Garcia; 2 Noes: Representative(s) Poepoe, Shimizu; and 2 Excused: Representative(s) Belatti, Sayama.
